title: indigofera adesmiifolia
intro: Indigofera adesmiifolia, also known as the Desmodium-leaf indigo, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Indigofera adesmiifolia include treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as providing relief from pain and swelling. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
